description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy job called production that runs only on the master branch. The job uses the default GitLab runner image, installs the dpl gem with `gem install dpl`, then executes `dpl --provider=heroku --app=codeandsupplybot --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY` to deploy the code to the Heroku app named codeandsupplybot, using the HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY secret.
